title: Hieracium obatrescens
taxonomy:
I found some information about Hieracium obatrescens classification. 
Hieracium obatrescens belongs to the family Asteraceae. 
This plant is a species of hawkweed, a type of flowering plant. 
Hieracium obatrescens is native to the western mountainous regions of North America. 
Its classification also includes the genus name Hieracium, which is part of the larger group of dandelion-like plants.

intro: Hieracium obatrescens, commonly known as the hawkweed or life-everlasting, is a flowering plant species belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, which may aid in the treatment of wounds, digestive issues, and respiratory problems. The bioactive constituents of Hieracium obatrescens include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In herbal medicine, the plant is typically prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to treat conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations.
